name: Fudge<how to Make Good Fudge>
recipeIngredient: 8 ounces semi-sweet chocolate chips or chunks
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sugar and 1/2 cup butter in a heavy saucepan over medium-low heat.
2. Stir until the butter melts.
3. Bring to a boil without stirring, then cook for 2 minutes without stirring.
4. Remove from heat and stir in remaining butter, milk, and vanilla extract.
5. Pour into a greased or lined baking dish.
6. Allow to cool at room temperature.
7. Beat with an electric mixer until the mixture is smooth and creamy.
8. If using marshmallow creme, add it just before the fudge sets up.
9. Spread on wax paper or parchment.
10. Cool completely at room temperature before cutting into squares.
